name_en: Top-tier Original M69410 Monogram Macassar Suit Wallet
name_cn:
Top-tier Original M69410 Monogram Macassar Suit Wallet
This Brazza wallet features a slender design reimagined with Monogram Macassar coated canvas and smooth calfskin. It includes card slots, a coin pocket, and a compartment for bills and tickets, fitting perfectly into a jacket pocket.
Size: 10.0 x 19.0 x 2.0 cm (L x H x W)
